scored_tasks.description: Verify PreCompact hook executes before context compaction
scored_tasks.notes: Hook fires on both manual /compact and auto-compact triggers

scored_tasks.description: Verify hook can archive conversation transcript before compaction
scored_tasks.notes: Hook receives trigger type (manual/auto) and custom_instructions in payload

decision_rationale: Feature works correctly and improves context preservation safety. Value gate not met (speedup_ratio 0.0 -- this is a safety/resilience feature, not a speed feature). Security gate requires review of hook script permissions. Recommend enabling after writing the PreCompact hook script.
